research_points.findings: Microservices are a key design pattern in distributed systems, allowing for better scalability and maintainability.
research_points.relevance: This finding is relevant because microservices enable teams to operate independently, making it easier to scale individual services without affecting the entire system.

sources.title: Service Mesh: A Guide to Microservice Communication

research_points.findings: Effective solution design is key to successful microservice architecture.
research_points.relevance: This finding is relevant because designing a correct microservice architecture requires consideration of scalability, concurrency, and fault tolerance.

sources.title: Designing Microservices for Scalability and Reliability

summary: Effective microservices solution design is crucial for scalable, maintainable, and reliable architectures.
